info.description: Unified observability platform for AI agents, APIs, and infrastructure.
info.title: Keelwave API

delete.description: Revokes an API key by UUID. Subsequent requests using this key will return 401.

get.description: Returns all projects ordered by created_at desc.

post.description: Creates a tenant project; all ingest rows are scoped by project_id.

delete.description: Deletes a project and cascades to its api_keys and ingest rows.

get.description: Returns all API keys for a project ordered by created_at desc. Plaintext is never returned; only metadata and hash-derived ID.

post.description: Generates a new API key for a project. Plaintext key is returned ONCE in the response; only the SHA-256 hash is stored.

get.description: Rolls up run outcomes per agent_name: total runs, completion rate, loop rate, avg cost, and avg tokens over the window.
get.summary: Per-agent run-health rollup for the calling project
List agent runs for the calling project
Run counts grouped by termination reason

get.description: Returns per-bucket run outcome counts (total, completed, failed, loop) via TimescaleDB time_bucket. bucket is one of 1h, 6h, 1d.
get.summary: Bucketed run counts over time for the calling project
Fetch a single agent run by id

parameters.description: RFC3339; if set, lookup is bounded to a 2s window for fast chunk pruning
parameters.name: at

get.description: Returns each tool_name + input fingerprint repeated >= 2 times.
get.summary: Loop detection for an agent run
List steps for an agent run, ordered by step_index asc
Run summary + duration percentiles for the calling project, current vs previous window

get.description: Aggregates tool calls across every run in the window: call count, success/fail counts, success rate, and p95 latency per tool.
get.summary: Per-tool usage analytics for the calling project

get.description: Returns service status, version, and environment.

post.description: Opens a new agent run record with status="running". Returns id + timestamp; the client must pass both back to finish the run.
Marks a run terminal and writes totals. timestamp must match the value returned at start (hypertable PK).
Records one step in an agent loop. Server computes a SHA-256 fingerprint of tool_name + tool_input for loop detection and bumps the agent_tools registry when tool_name is present.
Records one LLM call: model, token counts, cost, latency, status. project_id is derived from the API key.
post.summary: Ingest an AI / LLM call trace

post.description: Records one HTTP request: method, path, status, duration. project_id is derived from the API key.
Records one infrastructure metric sample (cpu_percent, memory_used, etc.). project_id is derived from the API key.
